title: Device Home Screen - Device Onboarding Screens
scenario: Verify the full onboarding flow for first-time device connection (Osprey/Tern/Emu), including welcome popup, navigation, content alignment, fit test, and completion.
steps: Connect a supported device (Osprey/Tern/Emu) for the first time.
Verify the welcome popup is displayed.
Navigate through onboarding screens using swiping or the navigation buttons.
Check that content and animations match the Figma designs (https://www.figma.com/design/IgfSERyqCoRH3Iyejre5oE/Lens-Mobile-%7C-Archive?node-id=50024-76867&t=Y8SevCnF1q6QyVis-0).
Test the fit test functionality and verify both pass and fail states.
Complete the onboarding flow by tapping the 'Done' or 'User Guide' button.
Connect a second device and verify the onboarding flow is displayed again.
expected: Onboarding screens are displayed for the first-time connection of a supported device (Osprey/Tern/Emu). The full flow works correctly: welcome popup appears, navigation (swiping/buttons) functions, content and animations match Figma designs, fit test handles pass/fail states, completion buttons ('Done'/'User Guide') work, and onboarding is shown again for a second device.
